inputs.label: DBH (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the tree at breast height (1.3 m above ground)

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the tree at breast height (1.3 m above ground)
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser des Baumes in Brusthöhe (1,3 m über dem Boden)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de l'arbre à hauteur de poitrine (1,3 m au-dessus du sol)
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro del árbol a la altura del pecho (1.3 m sobre el suelo)

inputs.label: Tree Height (m)
inputs.businessContext: Total vertical height of the tree

businessContext_i18n.en: Total vertical height of the tree

inputs.label: Miller Form Factor (k)
inputs.businessContext: Empirical constant for volume estimation (typically 0.42 for conifers)

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical constant for volume estimation (typically 0.42 for conifers)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hacim tahmini için ampirik sabit (ibreli ağaçlar için tipik olarak 0.42)
businessContext_i18n.de: Empirische Konstante für die Volumenschätzung (typischerweise 0,42 für Nadelbäume)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante empirique pour l'estimation du volume (généralement 0,42 pour les conifères)
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante empírica para la estimación de volumen (típicamente 0.42 para coníferas)

inputs.label: Safety/Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for calibration or safety (1.0 = standard estimate)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for calibration or safety (1.0 = standard estimate)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalibrasyon veya güvenlik için çarpan (1.0 = standart tahmin)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour l'étalonnage ou la sécurité (1,0 = estimation standard)
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para calibración o seguridad (1.0 = estimación estándar)
